docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOO, EDWIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
